K. Knowles Excursions in Security

EHLO World

03 Jun 2017

Blog is up! Jekyll with Github pages has felt modern and logical so far, and I’m thankful for the GUI-less setup. Watch this space for talks, thoughts, and tech adventures. Looking forward to sharing my work with you.
